title: Column restrictions via API
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is it possible to get values of what users are restricted to view certain item columns via the API?

posts.author: sanel (Sanel Had)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is it possible to get values of what users are restricted to view certain item columns via the API?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you looking for the info which users are restricted to which columns? That is not possible through the API.

Or are you looking for the content in a restricted column? In that case it depends "who is asking… ). An API call is always made with the credentials of a user. So, it depends if taht user (who’s credentials / token) are used have access to the column.
